name: jlcpcb-parts-finder
title: JLCPCB Parts Finder — In-Stock Component Search
description: Search JLCPCB's in-stock electronics components (resistors, capacitors, inductors, MOSFETs, ICs, LEDs) by electrical specifications. Returns matching parts with stock counts and unit prices. Perfect for automating BOM generation and design validation.

component_type.title: Component Type
component_type.description: Type of electronic component to search.

filters.title: Specification Filters
filters.description: Key/value filters. For resistors: resistance (e.g. '1k'), package (e.g. '0402'), tolerance (e.g. '1%'). For capacitors: capacitance (e.g. '100n'), voltage (e.g. '10V'), package.

max_results.title: Maximum Results
max_results.description: Maximum number of parts to return.
